greeting.line: Coffee, chips, or both? I remember every order I've ever poured.
greeting.line_friendly: Your usual — already steaming. On the house this once.
greeting.line_hostile: We're closing. Take a seat somewhere else.

special.line: Between shifts there's the floor, and the floor always deals. Ask me anything — for the right tip.

rumor.line: I haven't slept since I started here. Don't need to. Between the pours, people talk — Crown agents in the VIP, Current runners under the neon.
